content.rendered:
1. Internet privacy policy

We understand that privacy is an important issue for users of, and visitors to, the NTF’s site www.ntf-group.com and its related domains. The following information is designed to help visitors understand what information we collect, and how we handle and use the information after that.
We will follow NTF’s Internet Privacy Policy

2. Information collection and use

The data controller in the case of www.ntf-group.com is NTF located in Jeddah in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The data controller in the case of other websites that reference or otherwise use this Internet privacy policy is NTF as the entity set out in the website that references to this Internet privacy policy.
NTF may collect information from our users at several different points on our website.

3. Subscriptions

If a user wishes to subscribe to NTF information via the www.ntf-group.com website such as press releases, we ask for an email address. NTF will use this e-mail address to send the requested information.
How to subscribe and unsubscribe: Users may open or cancel subscription(s) of press releases at any time by contacting NTF

4. Third-party services

We may partner with another party to provide these or other specific services. When the user signs up for these services, we will share names, or other contact information that is necessary for the third party to provide these services.

5. Extranets

Extranets provide customer-specific content and functions. For this site to properly fulfil its obligation to NTF’s major customers, we must mutually agree on which personnel may access specific extranet content and use specific extranet functions. NTF uses cookies, together with additional security mechanisms, to identify and track the registered users who enter extranet or other restricted-access portions of www.ntf-group.com (and its related domains).

6. External links

This site may contain links to other sites. Please take note that NTF is not responsible for the privacy policies or practices of such other sites. We encourage our users to be aware when they leave our site and to read the privacy policies or privacy statements of each and every site that collects personally identifiable information. This privacy policy applies solely to information collected by this site.

7. Changes to NTF’s Internet privacy policy

NTF may, from time to time, make changes to this policy. We recommend that users of this site re-visit this privacy policy on occasion to learn of new privacy practices or changes to our policy.
It’s important to us at NTF to hear what users have to say about our services, and our policies. If you as a site user have any questions, concerns, or complaints, or want to let us know what you think about any of our off-line and on-line products and services, you can use our general contact us form

If you want to access or have another request regarding your personal data, you can do that via sending an e-mail to privacy@ntf-group.com
